title: Add Tag column in images output
body:
This can fix #1051 
Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
why buildah uses hard code in the output format? 
```fmt.Printf("%-20.12s %-56s", params.ID, params.Name)```
We are matching the output of Docker.
@QiWang19 What does the output look like after this patch?

After this patch
```
IMAGE NAME                                               IMAGE TAG            IMAGE ID             CREATED AT             SIZE
k8s.gcr.io/pause                                         3.1                  da86e6ba6ca1         Dec 20, 2017 16:30     747 KB
quay.io/crio/redis                                       alpine               98bd7cfc43b8         Mar 27, 2018 14:50     28.1 MB
docker.io/library/golang                                 1.11                 d817ad5b9beb         Nov 2, 2018 19:50      795 MB
<none>                                                   <none>               2f35638c7403         Nov 8, 2018 14:50      981 MB

```
The `buildah images` man page has some example output that ought to be touched up.

:pushpin: Commit e3e3d3a has been approved by `rhatdan`
